name: openclaude-mcp
description: MCP control plane for OpenClaude — run the Claude Code harness against local Ollama models. Zero cloud token cost. KAIROS autoDream memory consolidation. ULTRAPLAN cloud planning relay. FastMCP 3.2.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available Ollama models with VRAM, speed, context, and license metadata

tools.name: set_default_model
tools.description: Set the default Ollama model for new OpenClaude sessions

tools.name: model_status
tools.description: Health-check Ollama and verify a model is loaded in VRAM

tools.name: start_session
tools.description: Launch an OpenClaude agentic coding session in a project directory

tools.name: send_prompt
tools.description: Send a natural language instruction to a running OpenClaude session

tools.name: session_status
tools.description: Get current output, status, and elapsed time for a session

tools.name: stop_session
tools.description: Stop and clean up an OpenClaude session

tools.name: kairos_enable
tools.description: Enable KAIROS autoDream background memory consolidation daemon

tools.name: kairos_disable
tools.description: Disable KAIROS daemon on a session

tools.name: kairos_log
tools.description: Retrieve KAIROS memory consolidation log for a session

tools.name: ultraplan
tools.description: Route complex planning to Anthropic Opus, feed plan back to local session. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tools.name: fleet_status
tools.description: Get live fleet summary: active sessions, KAIROS daemons, default model, Ollama status
